Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You hear me!? I wanna see evidence, smart guy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I don't need evidence. I already know everything about you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Like how you were arrested for beating up that guy in the park who snitched on you, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Whoa! He's still at it? This is the third time today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1003}My boyfriend was so pissed after he was accused. This guy's really asking for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Keeping quiet will only make things worse for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}If it's really not you, then give me some names.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}And don't worry, I won't tell anyone. You have my word as a member of the disciplinary committee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guy looks like he's[n]about to hit Odagiri![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 31 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Tch... Don't think I'll just let you get away with that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}What is it? Did you need something from me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 31 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Some people will lie and stab you in the back without hesitation if it benefits them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 31 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}People like that are a menace to society. Should we tolerate that kind of behavior? No, we should do something about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}If we turn a blind eye here, there's no stopping this from happening again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}And once it spirals out of control, there'll be nothing we can do. We should nip this problem in the bud while we still can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 32 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Then again, those who fight for justice have always butted heads with others. History speaks for itself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So let my actions serve as a warning to other offenders. A sensible person like you should understand, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like Odagiri's starting to trust me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming better friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I'm going to keep at it for now. You should head home before it gets dark.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Odagiri[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
